allow: Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Daniel\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\genMyTee-Claude" && node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/variants-map.json','utf8'\)\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Total products:', keys.length\); keys.filter\(k=>k.includes\('tee'\)||k.includes\('shirt'\)||k.includes\('hoodie'\)||k.includes\('sweatshirt'\)||k.includes\('polo'\)\).forEach\(k=>{const colors=Object.keys\(d[k]\);console.log\(k,'=>',colors.length,'colors:',colors.slice\(0,5\).join\(', '\),colors.length>5?'...':''\); if\(colors.length>0\){const sizes=Object.keys\(d[k][colors[0]]\);console.log\('  sizes:',sizes.join\(', '\)\)}}\)")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Daniel\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\genMyTee-Claude" && node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/variants-map.json','utf8'\)\); const keys=['all-over-print-mens-athletic-t-shirt','all-over-print-mens-crew-neck-t-shirt','gildan-5000','all-over-print-hoodie']; keys.forEach\(k=>{if\(!d[k]\){console.log\(k,'NOT FOUND'\);return;} const top=Object.keys\(d[k]\); console.log\(k+':'\); console.log\('  top:',top.join\(', '\)\); const first=top[0]; const val=d[k][first]; if\(typeof val==='object'\){console.log\('  '+first+' =>',JSON.stringify\(val\)\)} else {console.log\('  '+first+' =>',val\)}}\)")
